title: AutoTotem Plus
description:
A 1.21+ compatiable auto totem mod.

NOTE: THIS MOD IS NOT MEANT TO BE USED FOR BREAKING ANY SERVER RULES
body:
🔥 Auto Totem – Never Die Unprepared
Stay alive when it matters most.
Auto Totem is a lightweight, client-side Fabric mod that automatically equips a Totem of Undying in your offhand the moment you're in danger — giving you a fighting chance when others panic.

🛡️ Why Auto Totem?
⚡ Instant Reaction – Swaps a totem into your offhand just before fatal damage strikes.

🧠 Smart Logic – Only activates when you're holding no totem, ensuring seamless gameplay.

🎮 Fully Client-Side – Works on any vanilla or modded server. No server installation needed.

🎯 PvP & Hardcore Ready – Designed for high-stakes environments where every millisecond counts.

✅ Compatible With:
Minecraft 1.21.1+

Fabric Loader

Works on multiplayer servers, realms, and singleplayer worlds

Don’t let one mistake end your run.
Auto Totem has your back — even when you don’t.

💾 Download now and take the guesswork out of survival.
